mapper.sql: id , deviceId, deviceName, deviceSn, visKey, visSecret, `source`, storeId, createTime
mapper.select:
select
from store_device_v2 where visKey = #{visKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select
from store_device_v2 where deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
select deviceId, deviceName, `state`, userId, autoClose from store_device_v2 where deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into store_device_v2
deviceId,
deviceName,
`source`,
storeId,
status,
createTime,
#{deviceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{source,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{storeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime},
